---
title: "Comparing loss of polling location to share of mail voters"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    embed-resources: true
author: "Akira Kyles and Diego Torrealba"
date: last-modified
date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD: HH:MM"
output: html_document
editor_options:
  markdown:
    wrap: sentence
---

# For all states
::: {.panel-tabset}

## 2016-2024

```{=html}
<iframe src="total_ppp_&_mail_share_16_24.html" width="100%" height="500px" style="border:none;"></iframe>
```


## 2016-2020

```{=html}
<iframe src="total_ppp_&_mail_share_16_20.html" width="100%" height="500px" style="border:none;"></iframe>
```


## 2020-2024

```{=html}
<iframe src="total_ppp_&_mail_share_20_24.html" width="100%" height="500px" style="border:none;"></iframe>
```

:::

# Selected states

States included: 

- Pennsylvania
- Ohio
- Florida
- Georgia
- Rhode Island
- Massachusetts
- Alabama

::: {.callout-note}
## A note on missing data
**Alabama** does not have mail voter turnout data for 2020, which gets filtered out when finding jurisdictions that have data points for 2016, 2020 and 2024. 
:::

```{=html}
<iframe src="selected-states-total-ppp-and-mail-16-24.html" width="100%" height="500px" style="border:none;"></iframe>
```
